message:
refactor(events): remove StatusUpdateReceived event variant

Complete removal of Lua status update infrastructure:
- Remove StatusUpdateReceived enum variant from events.rs
- Update event routing in ingest.rs to remove status handling
- Clean up remaining references in setup.rs

The StatusUpdateReceived event was receiving data from the 60Hz
update-status Lua hook. Alt-screen detection now uses escape
sequence parsing, and pane metadata uses 'wezterm cli list'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
